chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 26 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection No.2 at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 21.05.2024 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution. J U D G E Abdul Basit
